studyName: NHLBI GO-ESP: Early-Onset Myocardial Infarction (Broad EOMI)

tables.description: This subject phenotype data table contains sociodemography variables, race and gender, and myocardial infarction status and age of MI occurrence.

variables.name: ESP_AGE_AT_BMI
variables.description: Age at baseline BMI

variables.name: ESP_AGE_AT_FRS
variables.description: Age at FRS calculation

variables.name: ESP_AGE_AT_LAST_FU
variables.description: Age at last follow-up for MI (missing for anyone with a baseline or incident MI)

variables.name: ESP_AGE_AT_LDL
variables.description: Age in years at baseline LDL

variables.name: ESP_AGE_AT_MI
variables.description: Age at incident MI.  For HeartGO, this is only filled in (i.e. non-missing) for those with adjudicated MI that occurred during the study.  It is missing for those that are censored.

variables.name: ESP_BMI
variables.description: Baseline BMI in kg/m2

variables.name: ESP_FRS_CHDPROB
variables.description: Framingham Risk Score predicted prob. (only calcultated in HeartGO for those with no baseline or incident MI)

variables.name: ESP_LDL
variables.description: Baseline calculated LDL in mg/dL (missing where trigs>400)

variables.name: ESP_LDL_UNTREATED
variables.description: Estimated untreated LDL (In HeartGO, it is currently baseline LDL divided by 0.75 for those on lipid lowering meds)

variables.name: ESP_LIPID_MED
variables.description: Any lipid lower med at baseline

variables.name: ESP_MI_BASELINE
variables.description: MI status at baseline (0/1)

variables.name: ESP_PHENOTYPE
variables.description: EOMI_Case; EOMI_Control; LDL_High; LDL_Low; Stroke; BP_High; BP_Low; DPR

variables.name: ESP_RACE
variables.description: European American; African American

variables.name: ESP_SEX
variables.description: Male; Female

variables.name: ESP_STUDY_SITE
variables.description: Clinic or field center within cohort

variables.name: ESP_T2DIABETES
variables.description: Type 2 diabetes status at baseline (0/1)

variables.name: STUDY
variables.description: HeartGO cohort (ARIC, CARDIA, CHS, FHS, JHS, MESA)

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: The sample attributes data table includes sample analyte type (DNA or RNA), body site where sample was extracted, tumor status, and histological type.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

tables.description: This data table contains subject IDs, consent information, and subject aliases.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJ_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate

tables.description: This data table contains the mapping of subject IDs to sample IDs and sample use.

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use. Seq_DNA_SNP: SNP genotypes derived from sequence data; Seq_DNA_SNP_CNV: SNP and CNV genotypes derived from sequence data; Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID
